name: Manual scan flow
description: Run a manual scan on the first configured account, verify Scan Progress -> Results screens.
prerequisites: At least one account configured with valid credentials

steps.comment: Verify Start Scan button on Account Selection
Wait for scan to start (folder selection or progress)
Capture screen state -- may be folder selection or progress
Wait for scan to complete (depends on account size; adjust as needed)
Capture final state -- should show Results screen with counts
